slides.title: *When* you sleep may matter as much as how much.
slides.sub: A regular schedule keeps your body clock steady. That rhythm is quietly tied to long-term health.

slides.title: Regularity is a signal
slides.body: Irregular sleep timing is *linked to worse health outcomes*, even when the total number of hours looks fine on paper.

slides.title: Anchor your clock
slides.body: The same bed and wake time *anchors your body clock*. Your hormones, hunger and energy all settle around it.

slides.title: Let morning light in
slides.body: Bright light soon after waking *locks the rhythm in*. A few minutes outside tells your clock the day has started.

slides.title: Steady beats perfect
slides.body: Consistency beats *chasing a flawless eight* on the nights you can. A reliable rhythm does more than the occasional long sleep.

slides.title: Weekends count too
slides.body: Sleeping in late on weekends *resets your clock backward*. Keeping the times close all week keeps the rhythm steady.

slides.title: Keep your clock *running on time*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, water and steps into one daily plan, so a steady routine is easy to keep.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
When you sleep may matter as much as how long. A regular schedule keeps your body clock steady. ⏰

Same bed and wake time, morning light to lock it in, and weekends that stay close to weekdays. Consistency beats chasing a perfect eight. Save this. 🔖
